scope: AgenC selection / hit-testing orchestration above the renderer ↔ openclaude src/hooks/useCopyOnSelect.ts + src/components/ScrollKeybindingHandler.tsx wholesale 1:1 port. AgenC currently has no equivalent files above ink/; this contract introduces them. The underlying ink/hooks/use-selection + ink/selection are already wholesale-ported (locked by openclaude-ink-wholesale-parity).
transformationRules: import-rewire: '../utils/config.js' (getGlobalConfig) → '../utils/config-shim.js' (AgenC stub returning { copyOnSelect: true } default)
import-rewire: '../context/notifications.js' → '../state/NotificationsContext.js' (AgenC location of the same useNotifications API)
import-rewire: '../utils/debug.js' → '../utils/debug.js' (AgenC shim added by markdown port)
extension-normalization, test-framework, env-vars, brand-scrub, react-compiler-args, ts-expect-error: same family as openclaude-markdown-wholesale

requiredBehaviors: AgenC runtime/src/tui/hooks/useCopyOnSelect.ts is openclaude src/hooks/useCopyOnSelect.ts post-transform — byte-equivalent
exposes useCopyOnSelect + useSelectionBgColor; consumes ink/hooks/use-selection from the wholesale-ported ink/ tree
wired to AgenC's getTheme (from runtime/src/tui/theme.ts) + a config-shim returning copyOnSelect=true default (no AgenC config flag for this today)
wires keybindings → ScrollBox scroll commands + selection focus moves
consumes useCopyOnSelect/useSelectionBgColor from the sibling hook port + AgenC's NotificationsContext + AgenC's keybindings layer
AgenC ships a small getGlobalConfig() shim returning { copyOnSelect: true } as the stable default — the only flag the wholesale-ported useCopyOnSelect reads
rationale: openclaude getGlobalConfig() reads from their global config store; AgenC has its own config layer but no copyOnSelect toggle today
future work can wire this to AgenC's actual config when a copyOnSelect setting is introduced
